skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以将任意张手牌交给其他角色，然后你本阶段以此法给出第二张牌或更多时，你回复1点体力。
skills.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may give any number of hand cards to other characters (distributed however you like, one card at a time to each target). When you give out your second card this way during this phase, recover 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 主公技，当你需要使用或打出【杀】时，你可以令其他蜀势力角色选择是否打出一张【杀】（视为由你使用或打出）。
skills.description_en: Lord Skill: When you need to use or play out a [Kill], you may have other Shu faction characters each choose whether to play out a [Kill] on your behalf (treated as used or played out by you).

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【杀】使用或打出。
skills.description_en: You may use or play out any red card as a [Kill].

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无次数限制。
skills.description_en: Locked: You may use [Kill] any number of times per turn.

skills.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶的X张牌（X为存活角色数且至多为5），然后以任意顺序置于牌堆顶或牌堆底。
skills.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may look at the top X cards of the Draw Pile (X = number of surviving characters, max 5), then place them back on the top or bottom of the Draw Pile in any order.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，若你没有手牌，你不能成为【杀】或【决斗】的目标。
skills.description_en: Locked: If you have no hand cards, you cannot be targeted by [Kill] or [Duel].

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张【杀】当【闪】、【闪】当【杀】使用或打出。
skills.description_en: You may use or play out [Kill] as [Dodge], or [Dodge] as [Kill].

skills.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以判定，若为红色，其不能使用【闪】响应此【杀】。
skills.description_en: When you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may make a judgment. If the result is red, that character cannot use [Dodge] to respond to this [Kill].

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1.

skills.description_cn: 当你使用普通锦囊牌时，你可以摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: When you use a Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用锦囊牌无距离限制。
skills.description_en: Locked: You may use Tool cards without distance restrictions.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置任意张牌，然后摸等量张牌。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard any number of cards, then draw the same number.

skills.description_cn: 主公技，锁定技，其他吴势力角色对你使用【桃】的回复值+1。
skills.description_en: Lord Skill: Locked: When another Wu faction character uses [Peach] to recover HP for you, the HP recovered is increased by 1.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色牌当【过河拆桥】使用。
skills.description_en: You may play any black card as [Dismantle].

skills.description_cn: 若你未于本回合出牌阶段使用或打出过【杀】，你可以跳过弃牌阶段。
skills.description_en: If you did not use or play out [Kill] during your Action Phase this turn, you may skip your Discard Phase.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可以失去1点体力，然后摸两张牌。
skills.description_en: During your Action Phase, you may lose 1 HP, then draw 2 cards.

skills.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以多摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw 1 extra card.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名其他角色选择一种花色，令其获得并展示你的一张手牌，若此牌花色与其选择的花色不同，你对其造成1点伤害。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character. They declare a suit, then gain and reveal 1 of your hand cards. If the card's suit does not match what they declared, you deal 1 damage to them.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张方片牌当【乐不思蜀】使用。
skills.description_en: You may play any Diamonds card as [Acedia].

skills.description_cn: 当你成为【杀】的目标时，你可以弃置一张牌并将此【杀】转移给你攻击范围内的一名其他角色。
skills.description_en: When you are targeted by [Kill], you may discard 1 card and redirect that [Kill] to another character within your Attack Range.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你不能成为【顺手牵羊】和【乐不思蜀】的目标。
skills.description_en: Locked: You cannot be targeted by [Steal] or [Acedia].

skills.description_cn: 当你失去最后的手牌后，你可以摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: When you lose your last hand card, you may draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以获得造成此伤害的牌。
skills.description_en: When you take damage, you may gain the card that caused the damage.

skills.description_cn: 主公技，其他魏势力角色可以在你需要时代替你使用或打出【闪】（视为由你使用或打出）。
skills.description_en: Lord Skill: When you need to use or play out a [Dodge], other Wei faction characters may choose to play out a [Dodge] on your behalf (treated as used or played out by you).

skills.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以获得伤害来源的一张牌。
skills.description_en: When you take damage, you may take 1 card from the damage source.

skills.description_cn: 当一张判定牌生效前，你可以用一张手牌代替之。
skills.description_en: When a Judgment Card is about to take effect, you may substitute it with a hand card.

skills.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以判定，若结果不为红桃，伤害来源选择弃置两张手牌或受到1点伤害。
skills.description_en: When you receive damage, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is not Hearts, the damage source chooses to discard 2 hand cards or take 1 damage.

skills.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以少摸任意张牌并获得等量的其他角色各一张手牌。
skills.description_en: Draw Phase: You can draw fewer cards and instead take the same number of cards from other characters' hands.

skills.description_cn: 摸牌阶段，你可以少摸一张牌，然后你本回合使用【杀】或【决斗】造成的伤害+1。
skills.description_en: Draw Phase: You may draw 1 fewer card. If you do, your [Kill] and [Duel] deal +1 damage this turn.

skills.description_cn: 当你的判定牌生效后，你可以获得此牌。
skills.description_en: When your Judgment Card takes effect, you may keep it.

skills.description_cn: 当你受到1点伤害后，你可以观看牌堆顶的两张牌，然后将这些牌交给任意角色。
skills.description_en: When you receive 1 damage, you may look at the top 2 cards of the Draw Pile, then give them to any characters.

skills.description_cn: 准备阶段，你可以判定，若结果为黑色，你获得此牌，然后你可以重复此流程。
skills.description_en: During your Starting Phase, you may perform a Judgment. If the result is Black, gain that card, then you may repeat this process.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张黑色手牌当【闪】使用或打出。
skills.description_en: You may play any black hand card as [Dodge].

skills.description_cn: 在你的回合外，你可以将一张红色牌当【桃】使用。
skills.description_en: Outside your turn, you may play any red card as [Peach].

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张手牌令一名角色回复1点体力。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 hand card to have a character recover 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你使用的【杀】需两张【闪】才能抵消；与你【决斗】的角色每次需打出两张【杀】。
skills.description_en: Locked: Negating your [Kill] requires 2 [Dodge]. Each time a character plays out a [Kill] against you in a [Duel], they must play out 2 [Kill] cards instead of 1.

skills.description_cn: 结束阶段，你可以摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: End Phase: You may draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张牌令一名男性角色视为对另一名男性角色使用一张【决斗】（不能被【无懈可击】抵消）。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 1 card to force a male character to [Duel] another male character (cannot be negated by [Nullification]).

skills.description_cn: 当你失去装备区里的一张牌后，你可以摸两张牌。
skills.description_en: When you lose a card from your Equipment Zone, you may draw 2 cards.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置两张手牌，令你与一名已受伤的男性角色各回复1点体力。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard 2 hand cards. You and 1 Wounded male character each recover 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当一名角色使用红色【杀】对你造成伤害时，其选择回复1点体力或摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: When a character deals damage to you with a red [Kill], they must choose: recover 1 HP or draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 主公的准备阶段，你可以摸一张牌，然后令其本回合手牌上限-1。
skills.description_en: During the Lord's Starting Phase, you may draw 1 card, then reduce the Lord's Hand Limit by 1 this turn.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，若你的手牌数大于体力值，攻击范围内包含你的其他角色使用【杀】不能指定除你外的角色为目标。
skills.description_en: Locked: If your hand card count exceeds your HP Value, other characters whose Attack Range includes you cannot use [Kill] to target anyone other than you.
